chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi, CJ Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho, J C.P. No.D-549 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.2670/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection No.20. 3. For order on CMA No.2671/2024 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 1st February 2024 Mr. Muhammad Sharif Bhutto alongwith M/s. Saad Bhutto and Zafarullah Bhutto, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Learned counsel for the petitioner undertakes to comply with office objection before the next date of hearing. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. We have heard the learned counsel for the petitioner and perused the record of this case. For the reasons to be recorded later on, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed in limine alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
